name: Feature Request

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem you are trying to solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or references about the feature request.
